execution_summary: I prepared a Python 3.10-based Docker environment, translated the original Stata .do analysis into a Python script (replication_analysis__py.py), and ran the one-sample Wilcoxon signed-rank tests comparing group-round mean market price to the fixed value 1.94 on the provided round1 and round2 raw CSVs. The run succeeded (exit code 0). The script concatenated the two rounds, computed group-round means, and executed Wilcoxon tests for (a) full sample, (b) non-dropouts, and (c) non-dropout & non-bankrupt (the script used placeholder flags for dropout/bankrupt so subsets matched full sample in this run). The observed Wilcoxon p-value (full sample) = 0.029, and the mean group-round price = 1.9063 (sd = 1.0801), which differs in magnitude and significance from the original reported p = 0.001. Note: the translation used a simplified dropout/bankrupt handling (placeholders) — this is a documented deviation that could affect subset test results. Overall the core focal test (Wilcoxon price vs 1.94) was executed successfully in the container.

code_executed.logs:
STDOUT: "Wilcoxon signed-rank test results (price vs 1.94):
full: n=792 stat=143025.5 p=0.029071026187066935
nodrop: n=792 stat=143025.5 p=0.029071026187066935
nodrop_nobank: n=792 stat=143025.5 p=0.029071026187066935
Mean group-round price: 1.9063 (sd=1.0801), N=880
"; STDERR: "". The script wrote fullsample_analysis.csv and round1_analysis.csv to replication_data.
code_executed.environment: Docker base image python:3.10-slim with pip-installed packages: pandas>=1.3.0, numpy>=1.21.0, scipy>=1.7.0, statsmodels>=0.13.0 (installed per Dockerfile).

results.hypothesis_tested: One-sample Wilcoxon signed-rank test: whether the group-round mean market-clearing price differs from the fixed value 1.94 (two-tailed).

findings_summary.direction: Observed mean price is slightly lower than 1.94 (mean difference negative).
findings_summary.effect_size: Mean group-round price = 1.9063; mean difference = 1.9063 - 1.94 = -0.0337; approx Cohen's d ≈ -0.031 (mean difference / sd where sd=1.0801).

tables.table_description: Group-round aggregated dataset created by the analysis script (group-level mean prices and meta info).
Subset of the grouped data for round==1 (saved for compatibility with original outputs).
